user.title: Connect to ZigbeeLens Core
user.description: Enter the address of your ZigbeeLens Core dashboard. HTTP is fine for the native Home Assistant panel and Open Full Dashboard. Use an HTTPS address if you want the optional embedded dashboard view inside Home Assistant.

data.panel_enabled: Show ZigbeeLens companion panel in the sidebar

data_description.core_url: Enter the reachable Core origin, including its scheme and port when needed.
data_description.api_token: Required when ZigbeeLens Core protects its API with bearer authentication. Leave blank for trusted-open Core.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate ZigbeeLens
reauth_confirm.description: ZigbeeLens Core rejected the stored API token. Enter the current Core API token, or leave blank if Core now uses trusted-open access.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure ZigbeeLens
reconfigure.description: Update the ZigbeeLens Core URL, TLS verification, or API token. Leave the token blank to keep the current credential, or enable Remove API token to clear it.

data_description.core_url: Enter the reachable Core origin, including its scheme and port when needed.
data_description.api_token: Enter a new token to replace the stored credential. Leave blank to keep the current token unless Remove API token is enabled.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to ZigbeeLens Core at the configured URL.
error.invalid_url: Enter a valid URL including http:// or https://.
error.invalid_response: The endpoint did not return a valid ZigbeeLens response.
error.invalid_auth: ZigbeeLens Core rejected the API token, or the token format is invalid.
error.token_conflict: Enter a new token or enable Remove API token, not both.

abort.already_configured: This ZigbeeLens Core URL is already configured.
abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one ZigbeeLens integration entry is supported.

init.title: ZigbeeLens options
init.description: Adjust panel visibility and polling. To change the Core URL, TLS verification, or API token, use Reconfigure on the integration.

data.panel_enabled: Show ZigbeeLens companion panel in the sidebar

core_unreachable.title: ZigbeeLens Core is unreachable
core_unreachable.description: Home Assistant cannot reach ZigbeeLens Core at the configured URL.

collector_disconnected.title: MQTT collector disconnected
collector_disconnected.description: ZigbeeLens Core is running but the read-only MQTT collector is disconnected.

no_networks_configured.title: No Zigbee2MQTT networks configured
no_networks_configured.description: ZigbeeLens Core reports zero configured networks.

no_mqtt_data.title: No MQTT data observed yet
no_mqtt_data.description: Networks are configured but ZigbeeLens has not observed device data yet.

mock_mode_active.title: Mock mode active
mock_mode_active.description: ZigbeeLens Core is running in mock mode rather than live MQTT collection.

incompatible_core_version.title: ZigbeeLens Core version is incompatible
incompatible_core_version.description: Connected ZigbeeLens Core reports version {version}, which is below the minimum this integration supports. Upgrade Core, then reload the integration.

core_version_unknown.title: ZigbeeLens Core version is unknown
core_version_unknown.description: ZigbeeLens Core did not return a valid version. Decision features remain unavailable until Core reports a valid compatible version.

core_decision_contract_incompatible.title: ZigbeeLens decision contract incompatible
core_decision_contract_incompatible.description: ZigbeeLens Core reports decision contract version {version}, which this companion does not support. Upgrade ZigbeeLens Core to a release that advertises decision contract v2. This is not an authentication failure.

decision_contract_older.title: ZigbeeLens Decision contract needs a Core update
decision_contract_older.description: Core reports Decision contract {version}, which is missing required companion capabilities or is older than v2. Update ZigbeeLens Core.

decision_contract_newer.title: ZigbeeLens integration needs an update
decision_contract_newer.description: Core reports newer Decision contract {version}. Update this Home Assistant integration to a version that supports it; do not downgrade or update Core for this condition.

decision_contract_malformed.title: ZigbeeLens Decision capabilities are malformed
decision_contract_malformed.description: Core returned malformed Decision capability metadata. Decision summaries are disabled; review Core diagnostics before choosing an upgrade.

decision_payload_malformed.title: ZigbeeLens Decision data is malformed
decision_payload_malformed.description: Core advertises exact Decision contract v2, but its Dashboard Decision payload is missing or malformed. Decision summaries are disabled; this condition does not prescribe a Core upgrade.

home_assistant_enrichment_unsupported.title: Home Assistant enrichment is unavailable
home_assistant_enrichment_unsupported.description: Core does not advertise the exact Home Assistant enrichment contract required by this integration. Registry names and areas will not be published.

home_assistant_enrichment_sync_failed.title: Home Assistant enrichment sync failed
home_assistant_enrichment_sync_failed.description: The most recent bounded registry enrichment sync failed. Core retains the last accepted snapshot. Review the categorical integration diagnostics; transient failures are retried automatically.
